subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Thy sweet letter brought delight to the taste of spiritual souls. Praise be to God, thou art confirmed and successful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین نامه شیرین حلاوت بخش مذاق روحانیان گردید الحمد لله موید و موفقی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
